h4c6c18cfg9ba5g4540g931ag05195bfe86d0: DON'T WANT PRAYERS FROM YOU, CHOSEN - WANT BLOOD. ON YOU GO.
h8f01cf4eg97b7g4babg8520gf8b82089393b: YOU'VE MADE YOUR OFFERING. EVEN BETTER - YOU MADE A MESS.
h97dc7df8g5be8g4c3bga81cg7c80d4936ebe: GO WITH MY BLESSING - SHOW THE WORLD THE POWER OF BOOOAL!
hb77c1a1bgcf50g4648gb24ag49ab97028c88: AND CHOSEN... SO YOU DON'T FORGET-
h87d15f07g6355g43eaga97bg90df377eeadf: Our blood to fill your oceans, oh blessed BOOOAL! Our bones to build your temple in the deep!
h67ba3768g22eag46ebg85b6gb002e62b856e: *A wave of pure devotion washes over you - and with every surge, you feel a presence grow in response.*
hb23bc8e0gbdc0g4725gb75egda37b593a71c: WORDS, PRIEST. PROMISES. YOUR GOD WANTS PROOF. WANTS BLOOD.
h2b876328g8a94g4be9g9998g8639c927a34d: *These beings are Kuo-toa - former ghaik playthings that manifest their gods through sheer belief.*
hd803f58fge6ccg46efgb041g453173746375: *These beings are Kuo-Toa - former mind flayer slaves that manifest their gods through sheer belief.*
hef652715gc3a8g48eeg988dg67abfb509238: YOU! Our Lord of Murder demands sacrifice! You will be an offering for the great god BOOOAL!
h10b99ee6g6f79g4621g99dcg94162ad224dd: You can give it a rest. Your 'god' isn't real.
h75913c82g85f6g4644gb605ge1f562d43619: *You sense a flicker of doubt - brief, but enough. For an instant, the godly presence falters.*
h2405e835gfee9g49b5gb5efgc9987e3bb2c8: Murmur a prayer. Wherever you go, your god holds sway.
ha0feb36cg6cffg4ac1g8f87g13718f41da06: ARGH! NO! SHUT IT! Shut your rotten mouth!
h3ed2bad4gf275g46ffg843bg058f0390c212: *You feel the presence waver - one moment a god of awesome power, the next... a common redcap.*
h2875b59cg3137g47b9gbf86g40261b2f7607: Don't do anything hasty, now. The fishfolk got plenty of power - we can share.
hdd293f0dg7f17g4642g919fg08f5a0e5cdfb: Shut it, you! I'm talking to... my Chosen! Chosen got power - you want power, don't ya?
h99bf0c4eg9e2fg4fddg8975gce2d56a2ef4a: That depends on the fishfolk, don't it? But plenty to go around.
h52351035g3fbcg4eedg8bcbg22a14ef1b2ab: I'll just kill you and claim it for myself.
hf4c03921g29e3g4f17g9417g950da83efde3: Kiss my arse. I'm the Lord of Murder - I'll show you why.
hcfa5b63cg1b08g4a46gbc62gc28fc7a3031e: [To priest] Well? Bow before BOOOAL's Chosen!
h83d2168aga7e2g4f43g86bcg268419a70d71: *You feel a swell of power again as the creatures redouble their prayers.*
hc5dc04b9ge822g41fdga474gbe6d7ea5e7a1: AH. BETTER. YOU ENT HALF-BAD - I THINK I'LL KEEP YOU.
h1b5e2a9fg0b16g4cffga976g5ebce46dbda4: GO THEN, CHOSEN. TELL THE SURFACE WORLD BOOOAL IS COMING. AND SO YOU DON'T FORGET -
h5a25e4bcg8a12g4bffg84deg672697b7abda: HERE. THIS BLADE IS MY TONGUE - AND I WANT A TASTE OF EVERY LIFE YOU TAKE.
hb2a6cc69g8837g448cg9b8bgee90ee4c05ba: GO WITH MY BLESSING, CHOSEN. TELL THE WORLD THAT BOOOAL IS COMING. SHOW THEM MY POWER.
hd2dee83dge9a7g4148gb118ga38a4004b521: BUT CHOSEN... JUST DON'T FORGET WHERE YOU GOT IT FROM.
h15ffe4a2gbcffg4302ga952g2c4e3fe1c86b: I don't need your power - or theirs.
h031c5313g8beag45c9gadf8ga9b5f0ea9ea4: Kiss my arse, then. This Lord of Murder likes doing his own dirty work.
hd011a1c3gdddeg4c8dgbdf0g43be2a6a4afd: I won't let you enslave them any longer.
h3fec1970gb659g4e1bg999fg43668ae5d21c: He's a fabrication. Whatever you created him for, you don't need him.
h2726ca04gea7cg4053g8358g4e3f2f7bebd6: YES, PRIEST. TRUST BOOOAL. THAT'UN'S A HERETIC - SO START CUTTING.
h0672af72g0d87g4e8cgaf36g5ca46c172b1e: Look at me. If there's any god of death here, it's me.
hfd4a8ec3gd089g46d0g9b47gcbd9a047f882: Seriously - 'BOOOAL'? Whatever this thing is, he didn't even feed you a good lie.
h58ca3041g214ag4422g9b77g18e9a335d034: Bhaal is the true Lord of Murder. Perhaps I should offer you instead.
haa39ee64gb733g43cdgb948g5db712a89bf8: Bhaal...? No... we are... we are faithful to Lord BOOOAL....
h0ba660fegb967g4236gb8b4g2f794f15747f: THAT SO, CUTLET? I'M A GOD, AND I FANCY A BIT OF MURDER. SIMPLE ENOUGH.
h835d9864gc3e7g48a0g9968g9d825bd1125e: WELL IT ISN'T MURDER IF YOU'RE WILLING - IS IT, CUTLET?
hdcbb8c00g6719g4c6dg808agd6ec383579f1: Get your bearings. What have you stumbled in on?
h78855ab1g1551g4769g8bbcgd671a95478d4: *That sickle blade - it's no religious totem. It belongs to a common redcap, fey creatures known for their bloodlust.*
h1488a431g6788g45b7g9e3eg491dfe7dced7: WELL, PRIEST? BOOOAL WANTS A SACRIFICE! BOOOAL WANTS BLOOD.
h21860012g5cfcg4c3ega213g97e885f7e393: Wait! If it's blood you want, I can make another offer.
hbc0a9f3bg2596g443cg9189g89affd627832: OH? WHAT'S THAT, THEN? WHAT YOU GOT FOR BLESSED BOOOAL?
he5887d7cg9f76g4b47g86a3g7877e228c98e: OH? WHAT'S THAT, THEN? SEE YOU GOT MEAT TO SPARE.
h38b94ff9g99a0g490cg83ddgff89015980c6: WHAT YOU GOT FOR BLESSED BOOOAL?
h44d462e1g176bg44aagbfb1gdf4945470034: You want me to sacrifice one of my friends?
h1d4241a8g78dfg419egbde1ga22fa6aa526b: You wouldn't dare betray a child of Gith on the whims of this web-toed wonder.
h300d321eg0d1bg4dc9g851cg51844c47891c: I want to wake up beside a handsome virgin every morning, but life doesn't give us what we want. Can we kill this 'god' now?
he2325434gb609g4209g9aaag601bf20cf24c: Don't be rash, now. The Blade may be tolerant, but he won't let himself be fed to the fishes.
h47b9ba7cg4f85g4a78ga753g3f599e1fc26b: Tread carefully, now. Not even a god would survive sacrificing me.
h14d8de17g86adg425fgbf27g3ae86996e496: IT'S SIMPLE. MAKE AN OFFERING - OR BECOME ONE.
hde24182fgb749g487ag9fd4g9d171ec4d2c9: What? You're bowing to this gutter-throated idol?
hbc352e26gce83g453fg823ag6bd64cb6896b: You wretched little worm. I'll show you murder worthy of a God!
h39997f3dg5a99g4b10g826ag2c6e58d66f7c: You can sacrifice yourself first, you spineless rat!
h896bfdc4g86a0g47f9gb2adg5f4696c90f34: So it's like that, is it? So be it - the Blade does not yield!
he965940dga811g4b83g9877g18fc52d263d3: Not treading carefully, then? Out with a bang it is.
h3c5885bbga3b4g4423gbbb4g925587deb7f5: GONNA BREAK YOU UNDER MY BOOTS! GONNA BATHE IN YOUR BLOOD!
hfb374724g627cg44d7gafe8geca7cb0007f0: I have only one life. But I can kill many more in your name.
hf2259126g047fg48a3g8d79g1aad9515572e: THAT SOUNDS LIKE A LOT MORE BLOOD. A LOT MORE MESS. GOOD.
ha44e19aeg82a1g4c44gbc56gdecd6f8b5baf: OH, DON'T WORRY. REST O' THE WORLD WILL KNOW ME SOON ENOUGH.
ha92c0c84gaeaeg40deg8feegcf7611fcbdc5: A demonstration of what the real Lord of Murder can do.
h0c173e16g812eg4184g84c0g2b3700cd7707: The wrath of a far greater god - let me show you.
h1d428685g0770g4398g9f85gb4f11f5f2955: The mercy of a quick death.
hb75e0bb7g1d57g4b84ga291gec5f45c68130: Redcaps love violence - bait him with an exaggerated tale of battle and bloodshed.
ha1b7622fg57bcg44d1g9109ga06f4ced6218: *In the outburst of emotion, you feel the divine presence falter - then revert to its basic, cruel nature.*
h6f0cb82fg0ae8g46f0gb902g8d973b9a1f00: TALK IS FINE. TASTE IS BETTER. PRIEST!
h120a465eg7777g4428g9399g3da14b01ffe4: Are your followers aware you're just a rabid little fey creature?
hba1479dbgcaaeg4256g902dg26635eef35f3: LITTLE!? I'M A GOD. AND I'M GONNA RIP YOU - TEAR YOU - WEAR YOU FOR A HAT-
h98a25b1fg29cdg4ebeg996eg809ad50a6e84: OI, PRIEST! YOU GONNA LET THIS'UN GIVE CHEEK TO YOUR GOD?
h4a53c9d0ge484g40f0g9e37gd2afd9fe4e85: Try to determine who - or what - they're talking to.
hfde8a77bg0a4eg48f0g95f7gea5190232af9: *This presence... the magic is not divine, but fey. And it is murderous.*
hc7930144g293dg4ccdgae1eg31edc6371bdd: *You don't recognise the creatures - but this voice seems to have a hold over them.*
